message:
fix: show demo Chart.yaml and values.yaml content for Kubara files (#5494)

Clicking Kubara files in demo mode now shows realistic YAML content
in the right panel instead of failing silently. Chart.yaml shows
chart metadata, values.yaml shows production-tested Helm values
with resource limits, security context, and monitoring config.

Non-demo mode uses the backend API proxy as before.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
